title: Copis Parties
body:
#

Copis Parties

# Features ## Party Creation - Players can create their own parties with a custom name using `/party create `. - Prevents duplicate party names and ensures a player is only in one party at a time. ## Party Invitations - Party leaders can invite other players with `/party invite `. - Invites are sent as clickable messages with `[Accept]` and `[Deny]` options. ## Accepting and Denying Invites - Players can accept an invitation with `/party accept `. - Players can deny an invitation with `/party deny `. - Prevents accepting/denying invites that don’t exist. ## Party Chat - Players can toggle party chat using `/pchat`. - Party chat allows sending messages visible only to party members. - Messages are prefixed with `[Party]` and show the sender’s name. ## Invite & Party Management - Tracks party membership and pending invites automatically. - Ensures proper removal of pending invites after acceptance or denial. - Prevents players from joining multiple parties simultaneously. Works on Fabric and compatible plugin servers.
